description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a smooth, golden-brown exterior and a generous layer of glossy, bright pink icing covering the top. The icing is irregularly applied, creating a wavy edge that contrasts with the even, rounded shape of the donut itself. Scattered across the icing are colorful sprinkles in red and green, adding a playful and appetizing touch. The donut's surface appears soft and slightly shiny, suggesting a fresh, moist texture. The sides and bottom are unadorned, showing the plain baked dough. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the donut is presented against a plain white background.
description: A round, golden-brown donut topped with glossy pink icing and colorful red and green sprinkles. The icing is wavy and covers only the top, while the sides and bottom remain plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the donut's pink icing with red and green sprinkles, and a wavy edge on the icing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, unadorned golden-brown dough with no visible icing or sprinkles.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with pink icing and sprinkles visible, but the icing's wavy pattern differs slightly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain, golden-brown dough exterior without any icing or toppings.
attribute_icing_type: Glossy pink frosted icing with a smooth, shiny finish and irregular, wavy edges.
attribute_placement_location: Unplaced; shown against a plain white background.
